body:
sapphic-dice:

dotwavsquared:

sapphic-dice:

“You’re like a sword, but girl”

- Best compliment I’ve ever been given, and in reference to me being aesthetically pleasing to look at lol.

something something having a sharp tongue

Nah, sounds bad for giving head.

But instead of a sharp tongue, perhaps it is a reference to your rapier wit. 😘
